text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I think I'll get going.
choice_data_list: What did you three talk about?
What did you three talk about?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Nothing important. I think the last time we met
was when we ate together a couple of days ago.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We didn't talk about anything special then either.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just how awful Ticket's test scores were and how
annoyed Hayahide was with Brian. Y'know, that
kinda stuff.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I'm fine with that. I've never been good at
making conversation anyway.
